cnbc.title: Trump claims Iran deal is 'unconditional surrender,' says his power has 'no limits': Axios
cnbc.summary: Trump said in an interview with Axios on Thursday evening stateside that he negotiated the deal to prevent the conflict from triggering a global depression.

cnbc.title: The average SpaceX buyer post-IPO is almost under water after two-day slide
cnbc.summary: Shares of SpaceX fell as much as 7% Thursday to $178, leaving the stock trading roughly in line with its volume-weighted average price of just under $180.

cnbc.title: Vance says U.S. isn’t giving Iran ‘a cent’ as he defends Trump peace deal
cnbc.summary: "The only way the Iranians get any of these resources ... is if they comply fully" with the terms of the deal, Vice President JD Vance said.

cnbc.title: Japan core inflation holds steady in May, matching expectations despite energy price concerns
cnbc.summary: Headline inflation edged up to 1.5% from 1.4%, while the so called "core-core" inflation rate, eased to 1.8% from 1.9%.

cnbc.title: Markets are set for a much more hawkish Warsh Fed than expected
cnbc.summary: Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh's tough talk on inflation Wednesday reverberated through financial markets.

cnbc.title: Trump administration temporarily cuts student loan interest rates for borrowers on autopay
cnbc.summary: The Trump administration announced it will offer federal student loan borrowers who sign up for autopay a larger interest rate discount.

cnbc.title: Amazon investigating engineers who criticized AI data center expansion
cnbc.summary: Five Amazon employees testified at Seattle City Council meetings where officials sought feedback on a year-long data center new construction pause.

cnbc.title: In photos: Star-studded crowd gathers to celebrate the Obama Presidential Center dedication
cnbc.summary: Barack Obama opened his presidential center in Chicago with former presidents, celebrities and dignitaries in attendance. President Donald Trump was absent.

cnbc.title: U.S. Navy ends blockade of Iran's ports and coastal areas
cnbc.summary: The Navy on Thursday lifted its blockade of Iran's ports and coastal areas at the direction of President Donald Trump.

cnbc.title: Waymo recalls about 3,900 robotaxis after some drove into 'freeway construction zones'
cnbc.summary: After some Waymo robotaxis drove into closed construction zones, the company implemented a recall to fix underlying software issues.
